# pond.audio

## Summary
Personal site for Jamie Pond, Founding Staff Software Engineer at Tamber (tamber.music), building AI-first music creation — audio engines, real-time DSP, and AI music tools.

## Topics
- audio software engineering
- AI music tools
- C++ / DSP / SIMD
- developer tools
- real-time systems

## Primary Pages
- https://pond.audio/

## Additional Links
- https://pond.audio/sitemap.xml
